'''zadhaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecidiology|cecidiology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecidiology|cecidiology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zadhaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædhæbæth|zædhæbæth]] || [[word:zædhæbæj|zædhæbæj]] || [[word:zædhæbæsh|zædhæbæsh]] || [[word:zædhæbæ|zædhæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadhadhabath|zadhadhabath]] || [[word:zadhadhabaj|zadhadhabaj]] || [[word:zadhadhabash|zadhadhabash]] || [[word:zadhadhaba|zadhadhaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadhabath|zadhabath]] || [[word:zadhabaj|zadhabaj]] || [[word:zadhabash|zadhabash]] || [[word:zadhaba|zadhaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadhafbath|zadhafbath]] || [[word:zadhafbaj|zadhafbaj]] || [[word:zadhafbash|zadhafbash]] || [[word:zadhafbaf|zadhafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadhabatha|zadhabatha]] || [[word:zadhabaja|zadhabaja]] || [[word:zadhabasha|zadhabasha]] || [[word:zadhabaka|zadhabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadhabath|zadhabath]] || [[word:zadhabaj|zadhabaj]] || [[word:zadhabash|zadhabash]] || [[word:zadhaba|zadhaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadhabathal|zadhabathal]] || [[word:zadhabajal|zadhabajal]] || [[word:zadhabashal|zadhabashal]] || [[word:zadhabakal|zadhabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadhabathatha|zadhabathatha]] || [[word:zadhabajaja|zadhabajaja]] || [[word:zadhabashasha|zadhabashasha]] || [[word:zadhabaka|zadhabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadhabathan|zadhabathan]] || [[word:zadhabajan|zadhabajan]] || [[word:zadhabashan|zadhabashan]] || [[word:zadhabakan|zadhabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadhabathaoro|zadhabathaoro]] || [[word:zadhabajaoro|zadhabajaoro]] || [[word:zadhabashaoro|zadhabashaoro]] || [[word:zadhabakaoro|zadhabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
